drills.title: Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: Notice: The school will remain closed tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: सूचना: कल विद्यालय बंद रहेगा।
sentences.pronunciation: notice: the school will remain closed tomorrow

sentences.english: All students must arrive on time.
sentences.hindi: सभी छात्रों को समय पर पहुँचना है।
sentences.pronunciation: all students must arrive on time

sentences.english: This notice is for all employees.
sentences.hindi: यह सूचना सभी कर्मचारियों के लिए है।
sentences.pronunciation: this notice is for all employees

drills.title: Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: The office will be closed tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: कल कार्यालय की छुट्टी रहेगी।
sentences.pronunciation: the office will be closed tomorrow

sentences.english: This notice is effective immediately.
sentences.hindi: यह सूचना तुरंत प्रभाव से लागू है।
sentences.pronunciation: this notice is effective immediately

sentences.english: Everyone should read this notice.
sentences.hindi: सभी को यह सूचना पढ़नी चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: everyone should read this notice

drills.title: Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: A meeting will be held next Monday.
sentences.hindi: आगामी सोमवार को बैठक आयोजित की जाएगी।
sentences.pronunciation: a meeting will be held next monday

sentences.english: Attendance of all members is compulsory.
sentences.hindi: सभी सदस्यों की उपस्थिति अनिवार्य है।
sentences.pronunciation: attendance of all members is compulsory

sentences.english: This notice has been put up on the board.
sentences.hindi: यह सूचना बोर्ड पर लगाई गई है।
sentences.pronunciation: this notice has been put up on the board

drills.title: Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: Contact the office for any questions.
sentences.hindi: किसी भी प्रश्न के लिए कार्यालय से संपर्क करें।
sentences.pronunciation: contact the office for any questions

sentences.english: This notice is in the interest of the students.
sentences.hindi: यह सूचना विद्यार्थियों के हित में है।
sentences.pronunciation: this notice is in the interest of the students

sentences.english: It is mandatory to follow the deadline.
sentences.hindi: समय सीमा का पालन करना अनिवार्य है।
sentences.pronunciation: it is mandatory to follow the deadline

drills.title: Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: Please keep your documents ready.
sentences.hindi: कृपया अपने दस्तावेज़ तैयार रखें।
sentences.pronunciation: please keep your documents ready

sentences.english: This notice was circulated throughout the campus.
sentences.hindi: यह सूचना पूरे परिसर में प्रसारित की गई।
sentences.pronunciation: this notice was circulated throughout the campus

sentences.english: Visit the website for more information.
sentences.hindi: अधिक जानकारी के लिए वेबसाइट देखें।
sentences.pronunciation: visit the website for more information

drills.title: Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: Follow the above instructions.
sentences.hindi: उपरोक्त निर्देशों का पालन करें।
sentences.pronunciation: follow the above instructions

sentences.english: This information is useful for everyone.
sentences.hindi: यह जानकारी सभी के लिए उपयोगी है।
sentences.pronunciation: this information is useful for everyone

sentences.english: Writing skills improve with practice.
sentences.hindi: लेखन कौशल अभ्यास से सुधरता है।
sentences.pronunciation: writing skills improve with practice

drills.title: Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: Make a habit of writing daily.
sentences.hindi: रोज़ लिखने की आदत डालें।
sentences.pronunciation: make a habit of writing daily

sentences.english: Good writing is clear and concise.
sentences.hindi: अच्छा लेखन स्पष्ट और संक्षिप्त होता है।
sentences.pronunciation: good writing is clear and concise
